files.purpose: Extracts raw text from uploaded PDF/Docx CVs with zero data loss.
Compiles structured JSON data back into production-ready, ATS-optimized PDFs and ZIP packages.
Scores CVs against 2026 ATS algorithms, keyword density, and formatting rules.
Interactive simulation agent handling technical Q&A, corporate dress codes, and psychological nerve-settling protocols.
Dual-currency handler integrating PayFast/Ozow for ZAR and Stripe for global card processing.
Server-side state manager for cart, checkout tokens, and secure document access keys.
Strict validation layer ensuring instant data sanitization under South Africa's POPIA and global GDPR rules.
Calculates semantic matching scores, keyword density, parsing friction, and formatting compliance against target job descriptions.
